title: calea jamaicensis
intro: Calea jamaicensis, also known as Mexican Dream Herb or Jamaican Dream Herb, is a plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety. The health benefits of Calea jamaicensis include improved sleep quality, reduced stress levels, and enhanced mental clarity, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia and other sleep disorders. Calea jamaicensis can be prepared in various ways, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
